description: Mappings from PostureIQ evidence types to PCI DSS requirements

controls.title: Network security controls are configured and maintained
controls.rationale: Network segmentation isolates the cardholder data environment from other networks.
controls.recommendation: Implement NSGs and firewall rules to segment networks appropriately.

controls.title: System components are configured and managed securely
controls.rationale: Secure configurations reduce the attack surface of system components.
controls.recommendation: Use Azure Policy to enforce secure configuration baselines.

controls.title: Primary account number is secured wherever stored
controls.rationale: Encryption of stored cardholder data prevents unauthorized access. v4.0.1 clarified issuer applicability and added a Customized Approach Objective for keyed cryptographic hashes.
controls.recommendation: Ensure all data stores use encryption at rest with proper key management. Per v4.0.1, keyed cryptographic hashes are permitted with a Customized Approach Objective.

controls.title: PAN is protected with strong cryptography during transmission
controls.rationale: Strong cryptography during transmission prevents interception of cardholder data.
controls.recommendation: Enforce TLS 1.2+ for all data transmissions.

controls.title: Access to system components and data is appropriately defined and assigned
controls.rationale: Appropriate access controls limit who can interact with cardholder data.
controls.recommendation: Implement least privilege access with regular access reviews.

controls.title: Strong authentication for users and administrators is established and managed
controls.rationale: MFA prevents unauthorized access even if credentials are compromised. v4.0.1 added an exemption: phishing-resistant authentication mechanisms satisfy the MFA requirement without a separate MFA factor.
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA for all users accessing the cardholder data environment. Per v4.0.1, phishing-resistant authentication (e.g., FIDO2) satisfies this requirement.

controls.title: Use of application and system accounts is strictly managed
controls.rationale: Service accounts must be managed to prevent unauthorized use.
controls.recommendation: Use managed identities and rotate service account credentials regularly.

controls.title: Audit logs are implemented to support detection of anomalies
controls.rationale: Audit logs enable detection of unauthorized activity.
controls.recommendation: Enable diagnostic logging for all components in the CDE.

controls.title: Audit logs are reviewed to identify anomalies or suspicious activity
controls.rationale: Regular log review enables timely detection of security incidents.
controls.recommendation: Configure automated alerts and regular log review procedures.

controls.title: Risks to the cardholder data environment are formally identified, evaluated, and managed
controls.rationale: Risk management ensures threats are identified and addressed proactively.
controls.recommendation: Enable Microsoft Defender for Cloud for continuous risk assessment.

controls.title: MFA for all access to cardholder data environment
controls.rationale: MFA must be enforced for all users accessing cardholder data.
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA registration. Target 90%+ registration rate.

controls.title: Anomalies and suspicious activity are detected and addressed
controls.rationale: Risky users must be detected and remediated promptly.
controls.recommendation: Enable Identity Protection. Remediate high-risk users.

controls.title: Risk to information assets from third-party relationships
controls.rationale: Third-party access must be controlled and monitored. v4.0.1 clarified the distinction between customer and TPSP (Third-Party Service Provider) responsibilities.
controls.recommendation: Configure cross-tenant MFA trust. Restrict B2B collaboration. Per v4.0.1, formally document TPSP relationship responsibilities.

controls.title: PCI DSS compliance is managed - Policy Compliance
controls.rationale: Policy compliance must be continuously monitored.
controls.recommendation: Remediate non-compliant resources. Target 80%+ compliance.

controls.title: Security vulnerabilities are identified and addressed - Defender Plans
controls.rationale: Security monitoring must cover all critical workloads. v4.0.1 reverted 30-day patching scope to 'critical vulnerabilities' only (was 'critical and high' in v4.0).
controls.recommendation: Enable all Defender plans. Configure auto-provisioning. Per v4.0.1, patch critical vulnerabilities within 30 days.

controls.title: Access to system components is appropriately defined - PIM
controls.rationale: Privileged access must be time-limited with strong authentication.
controls.recommendation: Require MFA and justification for PIM. Limit to 8 hours.

controls.title: Access to system components is formally managed - Access Reviews
controls.rationale: Access must be reviewed periodically.
controls.recommendation: Configure recurring access reviews for privileged roles.

controls.title: Public-facing web applications are protected - VM Security
controls.rationale: VMs must be hardened with encryption and security agents.
controls.recommendation: Enable disk encryption, managed identity, and MDE.

controls.title: Changes to all system components are managed securely - Web App Security
controls.rationale: Web apps must enforce secure configurations.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS, TLS 1.2+, disable FTP and remote debugging.

controls.title: Bespoke and custom software is developed securely - SQL Security
controls.rationale: Databases must use strong auth, encryption, and auditing.
controls.recommendation: Configure AD admin, auditing, TDE, restrict public access.

controls.title: System components are protected - AKS Security
controls.rationale: Container platforms must enforce access control and security.
controls.recommendation: Enable RBAC, AAD, network policy, Defender for Containers.

controls.title: Network access to CDE is restricted - Firewall
controls.rationale: Firewalls must restrict access with threat intelligence.
controls.recommendation: Enable threat intelligence. Configure rule collections.

controls.title: Network connections between trusted and untrusted networks - Route Security
controls.rationale: Network routing must be controlled and monitored.
controls.recommendation: Configure controlled routing. Enable NSG flow logs.

controls.title: Failures of critical security control systems are detected - Monitoring
controls.rationale: Monitoring infrastructure must detect security control failures.
controls.recommendation: Configure Log Analytics, alert rules, and action groups.

controls.title: AI Services Secure Configuration
controls.rationale: AI accounts in CDE must enforce network isolation and disable local auth.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access, disable local auth, enable CMK on AI accounts.

controls.title: ML Workspace Network Segmentation
controls.rationale: ML workspaces in CDE must use private endpoints.
controls.recommendation: Disable public network access. Configure private endpoints.

controls.title: Managed Identity Hygiene
controls.rationale: Orphaned identities create unnecessary access risk in the CDE.
controls.recommendation: Review and remove orphaned user-assigned managed identities.

controls.title: AI Deployment Governance
controls.rationale: AI deployments must have content filtering and rate limits.
controls.recommendation: Configure content filter policies and rate limits on all AI deployments.

controls.title: Storage Account Cardholder Data Protection
controls.rationale: Storage accounts in CDE must enforce encryption, TLS 1.2, and network isolation.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS-only, TLS 1.2, soft delete, and configure firewall.

controls.title: Container Registry Image Integrity
controls.rationale: Container registries in CDE must disable admin access and enable content trust.
controls.recommendation: Disable admin user. Enable content trust. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Container App Network Segmentation
controls.rationale: Container Apps in CDE must enforce HTTPS and managed identity.
controls.recommendation: Disable insecure ingress. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Cosmos DB Cardholder Data Encryption
controls.rationale: Cosmos DB storing cardholder data must use CMK encryption and disable local auth.
controls.recommendation: Disable local auth. Enable CMK encryption. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Database Server CDE Protection
controls.rationale: Database servers in CDE must disable public access and enable HA.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access. Enable HA. Enable geo-redundant backup.

controls.title: Web Application Firewall
controls.rationale: Web-facing applications in CDE must have WAF in Prevention mode.
controls.recommendation: Enable WAF in Prevention mode. Set minimum TLS to 1.2.

controls.title: API Management Secure Transmission
controls.rationale: APIM in CDE must disable legacy TLS and use VNet integration.
controls.recommendation: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1. Configure VNet. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Storage Container Cardholder Data Isolation
controls.rationale: Storage containers in CDE must not allow anonymous access.
controls.recommendation: Set all containers to Private. Configure immutability and lifecycle policies.

controls.title: SQL Server CDE Audit Trail Integrity
controls.rationale: SQL Servers in CDE must have ATP, per-database auditing, and TDE.
controls.recommendation: Enable ATP. Configure vulnerability assessment. Ensure per-database auditing and TDE.

controls.title: Web App Broken Authentication Prevention
controls.rationale: Web Apps in CDE must enable authentication, restrict CORS, and configure IP restrictions.
controls.recommendation: Enable App Service Auth. Restrict CORS. Configure IP restrictions.

controls.title: Database Server CDE Audit Logging
controls.rationale: Database servers in CDE must enforce secure transport and audit logging.
controls.recommendation: Enable require_secure_transport. Enable log_checkpoints and audit logging.

controls.title: Container Registry Image Integrity in CDE
controls.rationale: ACR repositories in CDE must enforce tag immutability.
controls.recommendation: Enable tag immutability. Clean up stale repositories.

controls.title: Incident Detection in CDE
controls.rationale: PCI DSS requires automated detection of unauthorized access to cardholder data.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender plans and configure alert rules for CDE.

controls.title: Incident Response Alerting
controls.rationale: PCI DSS requires 24/7 incident response alerting capability.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups with multiple notification channels.

controls.title: Security Contact Configuration
controls.rationale: Designated security contacts must be defined for breach notification.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with alert notifications enabled.

controls.title: Change Control Procedures
controls.rationale: PCI DSS requires formal change control procedures for CDE systems.
controls.recommendation: Assign Azure policies with deny effects for unauthorized changes.

controls.title: Resource Lock Protection
controls.rationale: CDE resources must be protected from unauthorized modification.
controls.recommendation: Apply CanNotDelete and ReadOnly locks on CDE resources.

controls.title: Policy Enforcement for CDE
controls.rationale: Policy compliance must be enforced in the cardholder data environment.
controls.recommendation: Maintain policy compliance rate above 80% for CDE resources.

controls.title: Backup and Recovery for CHD
controls.rationale: Cardholder data must be backed up and recoverable.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Recovery Services vaults with soft delete for CDE.

controls.title: Database Resilience for CHD
controls.rationale: Databases storing cardholder data must have high availability.
controls.recommendation: Enable HA and geo-replication for CDE databases.

controls.title: System Component Inventory
controls.rationale: PCI DSS requires maintaining an inventory of all system components in CDE.
controls.recommendation: Maintain comprehensive asset inventory for all CDE components.

controls.title: Service Account Hygiene
controls.rationale: PCI DSS requires management and monitoring of service accounts.
controls.recommendation: Rotate expired credentials and audit risky service principals.

controls.title: Session Management Controls
controls.rationale: PCI DSS requires idle session timeout and re-authentication.
controls.recommendation: Configure CA policies with session controls for CDE access.
